title: Looking for Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Looking for Financial Analyst at HDFC Securities Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Thane team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About HDFC Securities Digital Technologies:
HDFC Securities Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with HDFC Securities Digital Technologies!
